title: The Broken Easter
description: Add-on for The Broken Script themed around Easter!
body:
# The Broken Easter
Этот майнкрафт мод может ВЗОРВАТЬ ваш ПК... \
This is an add-on for [The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script) brought to you by me and a few members of the Russian TBS community, themed around Easter! \
What it adds:
- A bunch of new cool eggs
- Revuxor Chicken wa
- BREEDABLE REVUXOR CHICKEN????
- BABY REVUXOR CHICKEN NOWAY
- Null Kulich (kinda unobtainable)
- A bunch of other cool stuff!

The mod is still in alpha, so expect a lot of things to change!

---

## Big thanks to:
**Miaushi (Bobick Creator)** - Null Kulich texture 👍 \
**Daofi** - most textures + very kewl icon \
**UnknownEntityID** - models \
**Artis_Juck** - coming up with recipes + a few models \
And of course, **Russian TBS community**!!!
![wa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be1e6fce23c5e8c3666285ad96251559a20e7f99_0.webp)



Now enjoy the pure slop of ru general in the spoiler below :3

<details>
<summary>Additional information</summary>

As of 05.21.2026 (May 21st, 2026), the mod is NO LONGER on CurseForge, and neither are any of my personal projects. This is due to controversy sparking CurseForge and the company that maintains it, Overwolf. If you want to know the full reason, read this message from [Redstone](https://modrinth.com/user/RedstoneWizard08): \
![Message from mister redstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ca946bd31878fc4bcfaafe76a70974dfdb87f16.png) \
There's also a [Reddit post](https://www.reddit.com/r/Subnautica_2/comments/1tj0e22/curse_forge/?solution=38edba4083be8e3438edba4083be8e34&js_challenge=1&token=bbbe4bf1c9a2b5160829c4be34da5861b93ca9b4743034ff30bf86bbc50ff75d&jsc_orig_r=) saying the exact same thing as Redstone in the pic above

</details>
